scripts.test:prod: cross-env ENV=prod cucumber-js --retry=1 --format json:testResults/cucumber_report.json && npx ts-node tests/helper/types/report.ts
scripts.test:qa: cross-env ENV=qa cucumber-js --format json:testResults/cucumber_report.json && npx ts-node tests/helper/types/report.ts
scripts.test:staging: cross-env ENV=staging cucumber-js --retry=1 --format json:testResults/cucumber_report.json && npx ts-node tests/helper/types/report.ts
scripts.test:auth: npx playwright test tests/helper/auth/reuselogin.spec.ts --headed && npm run test:prod
